title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 250.110 - Revenue bonds to improve or extend for particular locality — how payable (districts)
text:
250.110.  Revenue bonds to improve or extend for particular locality — how payable (districts). — Any such sewer district shall have the power, subject to a favorable vote at an election called and held as herein provided, to issue revenue bonds for the improvement or extension or both of the existing sewerage system for the purpose of serving a particular locality, and such revenue bonds may be payable from the revenues derived or to be derived from the operation of the entire sewerage system of the district or may be payable from the revenues to be derived from the operation of the sewerage system in such particular locality as may be set forth in the proposition submitted at said election, provided, however, that the pledge of such revenues shall be subject to any prior pledge thereof.
(L. 1951 p. 638 § 10)
